error: Error: Locators must belong to the same frame.
diagnosis: Auto-heal was fixing selectors, but the real problem was the login() function corrupting page context BEFORE navigation. It attempted to load cookies from non-existent ./user.json and add them to a page that hadn't navigated yet. This created frame context mismatch.
rootCause: Page context initialization order - cookies added before page.goto()
solution: Removed login() function since Wikipedia doesn't require authentication. Removed unused imports (fs, promises). Page now navigates cleanly.
result: Manual fix applied - login function removed entirely
testResult: PENDING - awaiting next test run to confirm
